name: Ioto (Iwo Jima)
eruptionHistory: The island is rising at one of the fastest rates on Earth — over 1 meter per decade. Submarine eruptions occur periodically.
description: Ioto (Iwo Jima), site of the famous WWII battle, sits atop an actively rising volcanic caldera. The island is uplifting so rapidly that WWII-era beaches are now high above sea level.
